ado.set_progress:
```bash
PAT=$(grep AZURE_DEVOPS_EXT_PAT .env | cut -d= -f2)
curl -s -X PATCH "https://dev.azure.com/{{ADO_ORG}}/{{ADO_PROJECT}}/_apis/wit/workitems/{id}?api-version=7.1" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" -u ":${PAT}" \
  -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/fields/System.State", "value": "In Progress"}]'
```
ado.set_review:
```bash
PAT=$(grep AZURE_DEVOPS_EXT_PAT .env | cut -d= -f2)
curl -s -X PATCH "https://dev.azure.com/{{ADO_ORG}}/{{ADO_PROJECT}}/_apis/wit/workitems/{id}?api-version=7.1" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" -u ":${PAT}" \
  -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/fields/System.State", "value": "In Peer Testing"}]'
```
ado.create_ticket: Configure ADO ticket creation via REST API.
ado.create_bug: Configure ADO bug creation via REST API.

jira.fetch_ticket:
```bash
curl -s "https://{{JIRA_DOMAIN}}/rest/api/3/issue/{key}" \
  -H "Authorization: Basic $(echo -n $(grep JIRA_EMAIL .env | cut -d= -f2):$(grep JIRA_API_TOKEN .env | cut -d= -f2) | base64)"
```
jira.set_progress: Use Jira REST API to transition issue to "In Progress".
jira.set_review: Use Jira REST API to transition issue to "In Review".
jira.create_ticket: Configure Jira ticket creation via REST API.
jira.create_bug: Configure Jira bug creation via REST API.
jira.config:
- **Domain:** `{{JIRA_DOMAIN}}`
- **Project:** `{{JIRA_PROJECT}}`
- **Auth:** API token in `.env` as `JIRA_API_TOKEN` and email as `JIRA_EMAIL`

linear.fetch_ticket: Use Linear GraphQL API to fetch issue by identifier.
linear.set_progress: Use Linear GraphQL API to update issue state to "In Progress".
linear.set_review: Use Linear GraphQL API to update issue state to "In Review".
linear.create_ticket: Configure Linear ticket creation via GraphQL API.
linear.create_bug: Configure Linear bug creation via GraphQL API.

github.update_fields: Use gh issue edit to update labels and assignees.

none.fetch_ticket: No work item tracker configured. Ask user for ticket details.
none.config: - No work item tracker configured. Tickets managed manually.
